scope: Omega FISH cumulative functional demonstration for Releases 4-11

diagnostics.formula: log(catch/effort) ~ year + categorical effects + standardized continuous covariates
diagnostics.privacy_note: Outputs contain coefficients and annual indices only; vessel/skipper identifiers should remain in protected source data.

reliability.label: usable with stated cautions

items.explanation: Large gradients indicate the optimiser may not have reached a stationary solution.
A non-positive Hessian can indicate a saddle point, flat ridge or unquantified uncertainty.
Persistent retrospective revisions weaken confidence in terminal stock status.
A model that cannot predict omitted observations may be fitting history without capturing process.
Strongly contradictory data sources force the model to compromise or rely on weights and assumptions.
Large condition numbers indicate weakly identified parameter combinations.
Boundary estimates can indicate insufficient information or restrictive parameter ranges.
Different optimisers should reach materially similar solutions.

reliability.disclaimer: This grade summarises implemented diagnostics; it does not constitute independent peer review or legal/scientific certification.

mse.interpretation: Closed-loop MSE separates operating truth, observation error, assessment, management decision and implementation error.

results.name: Movement row conservation
results.notes: Maximum row sum should equal one.

benchmarks.scope_note: These are deterministic software benchmarks. Independent assessment replication and uncertainty-coverage studies remain separate scientific validation tasks.

limitations: This build provides functional foundations, not independent peer review.
The generated SS3 files are starting templates and require stock-specific control configuration.
Random-walk MCMC is a baseline sampler and not HMC/NUTS.
Real-stock accuracy remains dependent on data quality, observation models and verified model configuration.
